summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All 28 tests passed (20 existing + 8 new feature tests). Backend: selected_voice=null default verified for guest/register, name extraction working for 'Меня зовут X', short replies, and English patterns, personalization context loading verified. Frontend: Full flow Landing→Problems→Chat with voice selection working, both Miron and Oksana voices work correctly with proper greeting messages and avatar states.
critical_code_review_comments: SYSTEM_PROMPT (lines 164-323) correctly implements 4-level thinking architecture, 6-step dialog algorithm, and all specified guidelines
get_ai_response (line 329+) correctly accepts user_id and loads personalization context (user_display_name, session_notes) from MongoDB
Name extraction logic (line 569-585) correctly handles patterns: 'меня зовут', 'я —', 'my name is', 'i'm', and short capitalized replies
selected_voice=None correctly set in both guest (line 411) and register (line 446) endpoints
ChatPage.jsx correctly implements voice selection flow with voiceChosen state and GREETINGS constant for both Miron/Oksana
TTS greeting pre-caching implemented for both voices (lines 57-81 in ChatPage.jsx)
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified: (1) selected_voice defaults to null for new users, (2) SYSTEM_PROMPT completely rewritten with 4-level thinking architecture, (3) Name extraction works for Russian patterns (Меня зовут X, Я — X) and English (My name is X), (4) Short capitalized replies also extract names after greeting, (5) Personalization context loads user_display_name and session_notes from DB, (6) Voice selection integrated into ChatPage with greeting messages and TTS pre-caching. All 28 backend tests pass. Frontend flow fully working.
